hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null | grep -q '\.rnd/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null | grep -q '\.rnd/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'self-assessment'; then echo 'INFORMATION BARRIER: self-assessment files are write-only records for the orchestrator. Direct reading is blocked to maintain information barriers between Builder and Verifier.' >&2; exit 2; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.rnd/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi
